# PERF-185 positive: http.DetectContentType in a request handler
lang: go
file: PERF-185-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	body, _ := io.ReadAll(r.Body)
	t := http.DetectContentType(body)
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", t)
	w.WriteHeader(200)
}
